- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	Project is a Finance Dashboard UI built with React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Recharts.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	Created Vite React TypeScript project with all necessary configuration.

- [x] Customize the Project
	Developed complete finance dashboard with all required features:
	- Dashboard overview with summary cards and visualizations
	- Transactions section with filtering, sorting, and search
	- Financial insights and analytics
	- Role-based UI (Viewer/Admin)
	- Dark mode support
	- Local storage persistence
	- Export functionality

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	No additional extensions needed for this React/TypeScript project.

- [x] Compile the Project
	All files created successfully. Ready for npm install and npm run dev.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Project uses npm scripts: npm run dev (development), npm run build (production).

- [x] Launch the Project
	Project ready to launch with: npm install && npm run dev

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	README.md and copilot-instructions.md completed.
